import sys
import threading

def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    
    N = int(data[0])
    courses = []
    for i in range(N):
        X = int(data[1 + 2*i])
        Y = int(data[2 + 2*i])
        courses.append((X, Y))
    
    # dp[0][i] = max tastiness when in healthy state after i-th course
    # dp[1][i] = max tastiness when in upset state after i-th course
    # Initialize with -infinity to represent impossible states
    dp = [[-float('inf')] * 2 for _ in range(N+1)]
    dp[0][0] = 0  # Initially healthy with 0 tastiness
    
    for i in range(1, N+1):
        X, Y = courses[i-1]
        # Skip the course
        dp[i][0] = max(dp[i][0], dp[i-1][0])
        dp[i][1] = max(dp[i][1], dp[i-1][1])
        
        # Eat the course
        if X == 0:  # Antidotal course
            # From healthy to healthy
            if dp[i-1][0] != -float('inf'):
                dp[i][0] = max(dp[i][0], dp[i-1][0] + Y)
            # From upset to healthy
            if dp[i-1][1] != -float('inf'):
                dp[i][0] = max(dp[i][0], dp[i-1][1] + Y)
        else:  # Poisonous course
            # From healthy to upset
            if dp[i-1][0] != -float('inf'):
                dp[i][1] = max(dp[i][1], dp[i-1][0] + Y)
            # From upset to dead (not allowed)
    
    # The answer is the maximum tastiness when in healthy or upset state after N-th course
    print(max(dp[N][0], dp[N][1]))

threading.Thread(target=main).start()
